name: python3-pyside6.qtcore
title: python3-pyside6.qtcore
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 core module (Python 3)
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 core module (Python 3)
pyside6 provides Python bindings for Qt 6.x framework.
.
Qt is a cross-platform C++ application framework. Qt's primary feature
is its rich set of widgets that provide standard GUI functionality.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for the QtCore module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyside6.qtcore because Python bindings for Qt 6 core module (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyside6.qtcore as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyside6.qtcore with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyside6.qtcore --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
